0.text: Centrally located mass in the right upper lobe measuring 6 cm in diameter adjacent to the mediastinum and enveloping the upper lobe bronchi

1.text: Thin-walled air cyst in the lateral segment of the right middle lobe, measuring 3.8 x 2.4 cm

2.text: Three closely spaced pulmonary parenchymal nodules in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe, each measuring 4 mm, decreased in size on follow-up

3.text: Nodule in the anterior aspect of the right lung measuring 7 mm in diameter, slightly more prominent on follow-up
